title: Task diagram generator for Mermaid graph visualization
purpose: Creates Mermaid graph diagrams representing task execution states with color-coded statuses. Used to visualize task dependencies and current execution progress.
module_context: Defines task diagram state interface and status color mappings for four task statuses: pending, in_progress, completed, and failed. Includes helper function to sanitize node IDs for Mermaid compatibility.

steps.content: Replace all non-alphanumeric characters in the input string with underscores.
Return the sanitized string for use as a valid Mermaid node ID.
Initialize an array to hold the diagram lines with the graph type declaration.
Define class styles for each task status using the predefined color mappings.
For each task in each batch, create a node with a sanitized ID and display name.
For each task with dependencies, create arrows from dependency nodes to the current task node.
Apply the appropriate status class to each task node based on its execution status.
Join all diagram lines into a single string and return it.
Extract the batches from the input task diagram state.
IF the batches are empty or absent, return a placeholder diagram indicating no tasks.
ELSE generate and return the full Mermaid diagram content from the batches.
